mtrl.desc: qCFW - Arrives to Slim (2500-3000) & SuperSlim (4000-NOR) PlayStation 3 Models
mtrl.dadi590_description: UPDATE (Feb. 20) -PS3HEN 3.4.2 Open Beta: Test #1 Released- (Forum Link)UPDATE (Feb. 20) -qCFW updated(forum link) --qcfw-20260220-release(github link)UPDATE (Feb. 17) -qCFW and Future potential(Forum Thread)by@aomsin2526>herehere< & >also here

mtrl.desc: [BD-JB-1250] New Exploit (bluray) for PlayStation 4 supporting upto 12.50 firmware from Gezine
mtrl.dadi590_description: The PlayStation 4 has new BluRay exploit that supports upto 12.50 Firmware. Thanks to the efforts of developerGezine,who has released the source code and helloworld.iso to complete the proof of work of this recent exploit for the PS4. Below you can see the readme for the project. Also some community reaction and comments about the new exploit for the PS4 from Abkarino & Modded Warefare dives into the exploit in one of his latest video attached​

mtrl.desc: {CFW Release} 4.92.2 Evilnat Custom Firmware (w/ Cobra v8.5) - Includes: CEX/PEX/D-PEX) + noBD/BT
mtrl.dadi590_description: After a successful Open Beta for 4.92.2, PlayStation 3 CFW developer@Evilnathas nowOFFICIALLYupdated hisEvilnat Custom Firmware'sfor the PS3 to version4.92.2,A number of new changes and options have been added in this release for your PS3 FAT and Early Slim models capable of installing a CFW PUP.Various patches to the CFW have been made as well as various new additions to theCobra Payload, Also theXAI Pluginwas not left out, as there are some new options one being a newNew Overclock menuhas been introduced to the firmware. Now we no longer need a dedicated PUP to change overclock settings, it can be done directly on the XMB. All the details and changes can be found in Evilnat's release note's found below and also in the link provided at the bottom.​

mtrl.desc: ProtoPwn (Protokernel Exploit by pcm720) - Now all PS2s are hackable via MemoryCard (MILESTONE)
mtrl.dadi590_description: Breaking Newsin the PS2 Scene,as a NEW MemoryCard Exploit for Protokernel PS2s (SCPH-10000, SCPH-15000, and DTL-H10000(S)) just got released!!!It took 25 years to reach this point, butNOW ALL PS2s including ALL special models(Arcade, Prototype, Debug, Consumer-model, "special/custom builds")can load Homebrew WITHOUT DISCS!​

mtrl.desc: BadWDSD HW Exploit - With new powerful qCFW for PS3 Slim & SuperSlim NOR models on the horizon
mtrl.dadi590_description: Update (Jan. 30) -@esc0rtd3whas releaseda new beta, while not the FINAL (yet) it is the first beta HEN with the qCFW installer.Update (Jan. 29) -@aomsin2526has released thefirst public version of qCFWfor the BadWDSD exploit, now we still needPS3HEN 3.4.1 (FINAL)for the qCFW installer to utilize the qCFW release.Update (Jan. 15)-@aomsin2526has provided a new progress report,qCFWis nearing a public release.>>>LinkUpdate (Dec. 8) -@aomsin2526(aka chattrapat_s / kafuu)has provided an update for the project, in the form of a "To-Do" list for the project, with some reported progress like"qCFW is done"see full post>>> LinkUpdate (Sept. 11) -New video demonstration and details "qCFW will be based on Evilnat PEX from now on. This means both CEX and...​

mtrl.desc: PS3HEN w/ Linux & Overclocking Support? BadHTAB A hardware-software based hypervisor (lv1) exploit
mtrl.dadi590_description: UPDATE 4 - (May 2 / June 9):@esc0rtd3whas created a fork of the BadHTAB Exploit with some changes such as an "Automatic reboot if glitch crashes ps3" feature among other changes to make it easier for testing the new exploit.(June 9)- ReadMe Updated in link belowUPDATE 2 & 3:Now, not only Linux but also Overclocking on PS3HEN is now possible w/BadHTAB exploit&PS3HEN (beta builds)that are currently supporting the exploit. This is still considered an experimental exploit & features soUse at your Risk. (See update tabs/links) for additional details and information on these advancements for the PlayStation 3.Original Article: Could Linux Support onPS3HENbe a reality with new exploit? Yes, and also other features but itsnot going to be for everyone. There is a newProof of Conceptreleased for the PS3 that has been implemented byKafuu(@aomsin2526)usingGeohot'soldhtab glitchon PS3HEN. Developer@zecoxaofirst started posting about this idea and the concept in Jan. of 2023 here inthe forum'sand has shared various thoughts and progress, with the latest progress being Kafuu's implementation.BadHTABis ahardware-softwarebased hypervisor (lv1) exploit,The exploit has a very low success rate of (5-10%)as GameOS has a much smaller "glitch window". As the readme states this not meant "for daily driver, it is for user's withskill and patienceonly.".​

mtrl.desc: PlayStation Home Revived and Enhanced by Home Laboratory!
mtrl.dadi590_description: Home is back on the XMB in 2025! Download and Play just like it was originally!I am pleased to present our extensive work on reviving and enhancingPlayStation Home. Led by AgentDark447, our team has developed an advanced, open-source iteration of this server platform, significantly expanding its capabilities beyond the original. Below, I outline the project’s scope, technical advancements, and access instructions for those interested in exploring or contributing.​

mtrl.desc: PS3 Toolset (by bguerville) with 4.92 support has been released.
mtrl.dadi590_description: If you have a Custom Firmware compatible PlayStation 3 Model and are running 4.92 Official Firmware and need to Jailbreak for the first time or if you updated your previous CFW installation by mistake to 4.92 OFW. Then the PS3 Toolset will exploit your PS3 via the console's web browser and visitingps3toolset.com website(see tutorial tab), then once the process has completed you will be able to install a Custom Firmware (such as 4.92 Evilnat) once again or for the first time.Your PlayStation 3 model must be able to install a CFW, these would be all the FAT models PS3 and Early production Slim Models. The easiest and most effective ways to determine if your PS3 can install a cfw​

Since the4.92 firmware updatethings have been flowing out from the community in response. We have seenPS3HEN (& hfw) releasedfor 4.92 and we have seenEvilnat updateand release his cfw collection on 4.92. Now developer@littlebalupdrops by the forumand release the latestDualBoot (DB) firmwareto support 4.92 firmware.This release for Custom Firmware user's is a very useful firmware, if you use PSN still and do not want to go online with a modded system and risk a potential ban. As it allows you to use an Official firmware that can re-install a CFW without having re-exploiting the console with the toolset or flash writer. See full details in @littlebalups release notes about the Dualboot firmware concept.​

mtrl.desc: 4.92 Evilnat Custom Firmware (w/ Cobra v8.5) Released - CEX,PEX,D-PEX,DEX builds
mtrl.dadi590_description: UPDATExai_plugin:New Overclocking Tools (change on the fly) / New ps2netemu improvements added.Following the4.92 firmware updatedeveloper's from around the community have been updating various projects. This time around PS3 CFW developer@Evilnatdrops by the forumand leave's us with a suite of ps3 custom firmware's that support 4.92 firmware. 4 Flavor's (CEX, PEX, D-PEX & DEX) are available for 4.92 Evilnat CFW, depending on your console/taste, all builds are equipped with theCobra v8.5 payloadto provide expanded feature set over Standard CFW's.If you are already on PS3 CFW, updating is a breeze, you just need to install the new CFW PUP file via the official USB Method and you will be on Evilnat's latest release. If you have updated to 4.92 OFW you will have to wait, as you will have re-exploit your ps3 console to allow for a Custom Firmware installation once again. The good news is that developer@bguervilleshould be rolling out a new update soon for the PS3 Toolset that support 4.92 firmware. The offline tool CFW Flash Writer may take longer for the community to update it, but we hope to see an update for that tool soon as well.​
